docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT TADES, YORDANOS MULUGETA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,485.68 FILED BY ADAMOPOULOS, CONSTANCE AS TO DEFENDANT TADES, YORDANOS MULUGETA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMOPOULOS, CONSTANCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TADES, YORDANOS MULUGETA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-02-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE ADAMOPOULOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YORDANOS MULUGETA RADES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
